mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE menu_tree AS ( SELECT MENU_NO, PARENT_MENU_NO, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, SORT_ORD FROM ST_MENU_BASE WHERE PARENT_MENU_NO IS NULL AND USE_YN = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT m.MENU_NO, m.PARENT_MENU_NO, m.MENU_NM, m.MENU_URL, m.SORT_ORD FROM ST_MENU_BASE m INNER JOIN menu_tree mt ON m.PARENT_MENU_NO = mt.MENU_NO WHERE m.USE_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT MENU_NO, PARENT_MENU_NO, MENU_NM, MENU_URL, SORT_ORD FROM menu_tree ORDER BY SORT_ORD
